title: Art appraisers in Charlotte, North Carolina

location.name: Art appraisers in Charlotte, North Carolina
location.description: Compare art appraisers in Charlotte, North Carolina.

listedAppraisers.name: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals provides professional art appraisal services specializing in European Art, American Art, Contemporary, Modern, Impressionist, 19th-century art, Expert Witness, Litigation Support, Authentication Research. With Decades experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Arcadia Art Consultancy
listedAppraisers.description: Arcadia Art Consultancy (AAC) is a boutique tangible asset management firm that provides advisory, appraisal, and collection management services for collections of fine art and jewelry. AAC's appraisers are USPAP-compliant and produce reports for a wide array of legal and financial purposes, including art lending, damage and loss insurance claims, equitable distribution, estate and financial planning, estate tax liability, and probate.

listedAppraisers.name: Art & Antique Appraisers and Restorers
listedAppraisers.description: Art & Antique Appraisers and Restorers provides professional art and antique appraisal and restoration services in Charlotte, NC.

listedAppraisers.name: Art of Estates - Appraisal Firm
listedAppraisers.description: Art of Estates - Appraisal Firm offers fine art appraisal services serving Charlotte, NC. Contact the business directly to confirm current service area, qualifications, fees, report type, and scheduling before engagement.

listedAppraisers.name: Bechtler Museum of Modern Art
listedAppraisers.description: The Bechtler Museum of Modern Art houses a significant collection of mid-20th century modern art. Provides art consultation and appraisal referral services.

listedAppraisers.name: Dana Summitt (Look Appraisal LLC)
listedAppraisers.description: Dana Summitt (Look Appraisal LLC) provides professional art appraisal services specializing in 20th-century American paintings & photography, Modern prints & rare books, Vintage clothing & music memorabilia. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.
